# Spendly

> SaaS platform for restaurants to monitor ingredient prices from KSeF supplier invoices.

Spendly helps restaurant owners track price changes across their supply chain by importing invoices from the Polish KSeF tax invoice system. It highlights price increases before they hit food cost margins.

## Product

- Automatic price tracking per ingredient and supplier
- Food cost trend charts and monthly spend analytics
- Price change alerts with configurable thresholds
- KSeF invoice sync and manual invoice import
- OCR invoice scanning from photo or PDF (15-second processing)
- Supplier management with invoice history

## Public URLs

- [Homepage](https://www.spendly.pl/): main landing page explaining the full product, how it works, features, and social proof
- [KSeF integration](https://www.spendly.pl/ksef): how Spendly connects to Poland's national e-invoice system (KSeF) to automatically import purchase invoices for a restaurant's NIP number without manual file uploads
- [Food cost control](https://www.spendly.pl/food-cost): automatic food cost calculation based on imported invoices, real-time supplier price monitoring, and alerts when costs approach profitability thresholds
- [OCR invoices](https://www.spendly.pl/ocr-faktur): AI-powered invoice reading from a phone photo or PDF in ~15 seconds; captures supplier, product lines, prices, quantities, VAT rates, and dates automatically
- [Pricing](https://www.spendly.pl/cennik): pricing page; currently free during the open beta period, regular price 200 PLN/month after beta ends; no credit card required

## Out of scope

- [Sign in](https://www.spendly.pl/sign-in): authentication page, no useful content for AI retrieval
- [Sign up](https://www.spendly.pl/sign-up): registration page, no useful content for AI retrieval
- All authenticated app routes (/dashboard, /suppliers, /products, /invoices, /price-alerts, /reports, /predictive, /pending-invoices, /ai-cfo, /settings/ksef, /settings/cost-centers, /admin/users) require login and contain tenant-specific data
